channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Meta tests letting Facebook Marketplace users view eBay listings in a bid to appease the EU
item.description: Meta is testing a feature that will let Facebook users browse eBay listings on Facebook Marketplace before being redirected to complete the purchase on eBay. The test, which is being launched to a small group in Germany, France, and the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: TikTok alternative Lemon8: Why creators are moving to ByteDance’s other social media platform
item.description: “Okay it’s happening… are we switching to Lemon8 or what’s the plan?” posted one TikTok user back in December. With a potential U.S. ban just days away, content creators scrambling for an alternative are turning their attention to the platform’s sister app, Lemon8.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Meta rolls back hate speech rules as Zuckerberg cites 'recent elections' as a catalyst
item.description: It wasn't just fact-checking that Meta scrapped from its platforms as it prepares for the second Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Japan links this Chinese hacking group to cyberattacks on its national security
item.description: Japan on Wednesday linked more than 200 cyberattacks over the past five years targeting the country’s national security and high technology data to a Chinese hacking group, MirrorFace, detailing their tactics and calling on government agencies and businesses to reinforce preventive measures.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Flying taxis could be carrying passengers in 2025, but hurdles remain
item.description: When he was still a boy making long, tedious trips between his school and his woodsy home in the mountains during the 1980s, JoeBen Bevirt began fantasizing about flying cars that could whisk him to his destination in a matter of minutes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Why I’m making 2025 my year of dead-tree books
item.description: Over the past 17 years or so, I have happily paid for hundreds of e-books—everything from reference works to history to novels to comics. Having immediate access to all of them on a device that fits in my pocket ranks among my favorite miracles of the digital age.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: From AI assistants to holographic displays, automakers showcase in-cabin experiences at CES
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Interior lighting aimed at reducing motion sickness. Shiny holographic dashboards displayed on windshields. And AI-powered voice assistants paired with infotainment systems to keep you company on long drives.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jeff Bezos and Lauren Sanchez to marry in Italy: Source
item.description: Amazon billionaire and his blushing bride-to-be, Lauren Sanchez, held a lovely dinner party over the holidays at Matsuhisa in Aspen.
item.dc:creator: Paula Froelich, NewsNation

item.title: Could this be the world's most powerful compact mobile workstation? HP thinks so
item.description: The HP ZBook Ultra 14-inch G1a offers a WUXGA anti-glare panel but also has a 2.8K OLED option with a 120Hz refresh rate.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Federal cyber leaders on delivering innovation
item.description: Need innovation inspiration when it comes to cyber? The post Federal cyber leaders on delivering innovation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Federal cyber leaders on building national resilience
item.description: How are you building resilience into your agency’s cybersecurity? The post Federal cyber leaders on building national resilience first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Meta tries letting Facebook Marketplace users view eBay listings as way to resolve EU charges
item.description: Meta said Wednesday that it will allow some Facebook users to view eBay listings on its Marketplace service, as it tries out a possible way to resolve European Union charges of anticompetitive behavior that the bloc leveled last year.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: When it comes to innovation and the technology to drive it, few companies today rival Nvidia. The company has leveraged its GPU expertise to become a dominant player in the AI market. Nvidia’s GPU pedigree dates back decades to high-powered processors originally built for gaming systems.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: ByteDance's Lemon8 gains traction amid TikTok ban threat as creators push the app
item.description: Hearing a lot about Lemon8 lately? You’re not the only one. Amid a looming U.S. ban on TikTok, content creators have been pushing the platform's sister app.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Koorui G7 Monitor: A 750Hz Refresh Rate Gaming Beast
item.description: Koorui G7 monitor demoed at CES 2025, offering a 750Hz refresh rate, 0.5ms response time, and HDR400 support. Analysis of the refresh rate's relevance in gaming monitors.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Monster Hunter Wilds is getting a second beta test in February, and you won't need PS Plus or Game Pass to take part
item.description: A second Monster Hunter Wilds beta test is happening in February - here's everything you need to know.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Disney Plus is working on its second reimagining of the cult '90s children’s book Holes – and this one will feature a female lead
item.description: Disney Plus has ordered a pilot for a reboot of the '90s novel 'Holes', but this time a female lead will take center stage.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: En marcha un test de estrés en español para medir los sesgos de la IA generativa
item.description: Las aplicaciones basadas en grandes modelos de lenguaje como GPT -el modelo detrás de ChatGPT-, Gemini o Llama han hecho posible que cualquier usuario ‘converse’ directamente con la inteligencia artificial (IA).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Leaked Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra specs reveal new details and a charging surprise
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra could support 25W wireless charging, but its screen may not be any brighter than the S24 Ultra's.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Japan links Chinese hacker MirrorFace to dozens of cyberattacks targeting security and tech data
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan on Wednesday linked more than 200 cyberattacks over the past five years targeting the country's national security and high technology data to a Chinese hacking group, MirrorFace, detailing their tactics and calling on government agencies and businesses to reinforce preventive meas
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 6 fast ways to free up space on your Windows PC
item.description: Want to free up space on your computer? With the right tools, you can quickly eliminate gigabytes of unnecessary files and get back to work — or whatever else you use your computer for. I’ve long argued you don’t need a “PC cleaner” app. You mostly just need the tools built right into Windows.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Port strike looms ahead of Trump inauguration
item.description: Tens of thousands of longshoremen could walk off the job from Maine to Texas next week if their union and management can’t resolve long-running contract issues.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Giorno, The Hill

item.title: 6 swift steps for a faster Android experience
item.description: Well, I’ll be: It’s a new year! Already. Somehow. I think. (For full disclosure, I’m still at least 77% asleep from my traditional end-of-year hibernation/hiatus. Kindly forgive any mid-sentence snores or nonsensical outbursts.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: New year, new commitment to digital innovation at Heineken
item.description: A true transformation journey for Heineken started in 2019, when Ralph Ostertag, director of digital and technology for Asia Pacific, joined after coming from Mercedes Benz, and years before that in other industries.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI Outperforms Humans in Ovarian Cancer Detection: Study
item.description: A new study shows that Artificial Intelligence (AI) based models can detect ovarian cancer more accurately than human experts, with an accuracy rate of 86% compared to 82% for humans.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: The cloud architecture renaissance of 2025
item.description: The perfect storm is coming that will force enterprises to rethink their cloud strategy. Cloud architecture will take center stage during 2025. This isn’t just another hype cycle. First, we need to talk about the elephant in the room: generative AI.
item.dc:creator: Info World
